title: [FEAT]: format first line of snippet as H2 heading in Discord announcement
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Polishing the headlines
gist.blurb: Our Discord bot just learned about H2 headers. It's the little things that make reading easier.
gist.summary: Modified the social publication script to automatically format the first line of generated summaries as an H2 header.
gist.impact: Discord notifications will be more readable with clear, bold headings.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot is holding a large pixel-art paintbrush, painting a bold headline on a floating screen. The bee is hovering nearby, giving a thumbs up. Represents the formatting change.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute robot with a monitor head painting a bold headline on a floating holographic screen. The bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny paintbrush. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'H2'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
